Name: Annual Membership Dues
Description: Annual club membership dues - Glastonbury Garden Club ($30/year)

Name: Plant Sale - Perennials
Description: Perennial plants sold at club plant sale (hostas, echinacea, black-eyed Susans, ferns)

Name: Plant Sale - Annuals
Description: Annual plants sold at club plant sale (marigolds, impatiens, petunias, zinnias)

Name: Plant Sale - Herbs
Description: Herb starts sold at club plant sale (basil, parsley, thyme, oregano)

Name: Plant Sale - Shrubs & Natives
Description: Native shrubs and woody plants sold at club plant sale

Name: General Donation
Description: General donation to Glastonbury Garden Club

Name: Memorial Donation
Description: Memorial or tribute donation in honor of a club member

Name: Plant Sale - Hosta Divisions
Description: Hosta divisions donated and sold at plant sale (June, Sum and Substance, Halcyon, etc.)

Name: Raffle Ticket
Description: Plant raffle ticket sold at annual plant sale or club events

Name: Newsletter Advertising
Description: Small advertisement placed in the Glastonbury Garden Club quarterly newsletter

Name: Seed Packet Sale
Description: Seed packets sold at plant sale and club meetings (heirloom and open-pollinated)

Name: Fall Plant Swap Registration
Description: Registration fee for fall plant swap event - includes entry and refreshments

Name: Guest Speaker Donation Request
Description: Suggested donation collected when guest speaker addresses the club

Name: Plant Sale - Vegetable Starts
Description: Vegetable seedlings sold at plant sale (tomatoes, peppers, squash, cucumbers)

Name: Club Tote Bag
Description: Glastonbury Garden Club canvas tote bag - proceeds benefit general fund

Name: Potting Soil - Club Use
Description: Bag of potting mix purchased for repotting plant donations before sale

Name: Plastic Pots - 4 inch
Description: 4-inch plastic nursery pots for propagating member plant donations

Name: Plant Labels
Description: Plastic plant identification labels for plant sale tables

Name: Newsletter Printing
Description: Per-copy cost of quarterly newsletter printed at Glastonbury Print & Copy

Name: Venue Rental - Monthly Meeting
Description: Room rental for monthly club meeting at Glastonbury Community Center
